name: Missing Standardized Error Handling Mechanism
description: The product lacks a standardized approach to error handling, handling errors individually on a case-by-case basis. This leads to inconsistent behavior, potential loss of error context, and unintentional exposure of sensitive information to users.
detection_pattern: Multiple STRUCTURAL[exception_handler] or CONTROL[error_handler] nodes across the application that lack a common STRUCTURAL[error_framework] mediator. Error paths from different modules flow to EGRESS with inconsistent TRANSFORM patterns, indicating ad-hoc rather than standardized handling.
